## ✅ Testing Results — VS Image with Fix

### Test Environment
- **DUT Image**: `SONiC.master.0-34af19e3a` (Debian 13, kernel 6.12.41)
- **Testbed**: cSONiC KVM virtual testbed (T0 topology, 4 neighbors)
- **Platform**: `x86_64-kvm_x86_64-r0` (Force10-S6000 hwsku)

### Fix Verification
- ✅ `wait_for_service_stable()` method confirmed present in `/usr/local/bin/featured` on running DUT
- ✅ All SONiC containers healthy (database, swss, syncd, bgp, teamd, lldp, pmon, gnmi, snmp, radv)

### BGP Session Status
- ✅ **8/8 BGP sessions Established** (4 IPv4 + 4 IPv6)

| Neighbor | IPv4 | IPv6 | Status |
|----------|------|------|--------|
| ARISTA01T1 | 10.0.0.57 | fc00::72 | ✅ Established |
| ARISTA02T1 | 10.0.0.59 | fc00::76 | ✅ Established |
| ARISTA03T1 | 10.0.0.61 | fc00::7a | ✅ Established |
| ARISTA04T1 | 10.0.0.63 | fc00::7e | ✅ Established |

### sonic-mgmt Test Results

| Test Module | Result | Notes |
|-------------|--------|-------|
| `bgp/test_bgp_fact.py` | ✅ **1 passed** | All BGP facts verified |
| `lldp/test_lldp.py` | ⚠️ 3 failed, 2 errors | Expected — testbed infra limitation (no `team` kernel module on Azure host, direct interface wiring instead of PortChannels) |

### Unit Tests
- ✅ **38/38 passed** (32 existing + 6 new tests for `wait_for_service_stable()`)

### Summary
The DUT boots cleanly with the fix and establishes all BGP neighbor sessions without orphaned containers. The `wait_for_service_stable()` fix does not cause regressions in normal service startup.

@qiluo-msft - PR is now ready to be merged after passing all checkers. Can you please merge and create a cherry-pick to 202511?
